title: Visitors from Hell: Paranormal Horror Stories
original_title: Visitors from Hell: Paranormal Horror Stories
overview: Their whole life they've experienced paranormal activity. What is the source of the haunts that plague their lives? Is it fabrication or is it something much more sinister? Explore the wild encounters that make their life HELL.
